CLOUD-PUNISHER_MODE_POWER.description: Increase physical damage dealt and all damage taken by 20%. Switch stance when you take unblocked damage from an enemy.
CLOUD-PUNISHER_MODE_POWER.smartDescripti: Increase physical damage dealt and damage taken by 20%. Switch stance when you take unblocked damage from an enemy.
CLOUD-PUNISHER_MODE_POWER.title: Punisher Mode
CLOUD-COUNTER_STANCE_POWER.description: Blocked damage is reflected to your attacker for 1 turn.
CLOUD-COUNTER_STANCE_POWER.smartDescript: Blocked damage is reflected to your attacker for 1 turn.
CLOUD-COUNTER_STANCE_POWER.title: Counterstance
CLOUD-LIMIT_BREAK_POWER.description: Gain Limit Break when limit reaches [blue]100[/blue]. Gain [blue]3[/blue] limit when you attack and when you take blocked damage. Gain Limit equal to damage taken.
CLOUD-LIMIT_BREAK_POWER.smartDescription: Limit is full. You can use Limit Breaks.
CLOUD-LIMIT_BREAK_POWER.title: Limit
CLOUD-PASSING_THE_TORCH_POWER.descriptio: Gain 1 energy at the start of each turn.
CLOUD-PASSING_THE_TORCH_POWER.smartDescr: Gain 1 energy at the start of each turn.
CLOUD-PASSING_THE_TORCH_POWER.title: Passing The Torch
CLOUD-CROSS_SLASH_POWER.title: Cross Slash
CLOUD-PRIME_MODE_POWER.description: Increase damage dealt by 20% while in Punisher Mode. Taking damage no longer changes stance. In Operator Mode, gain 1 ATB at the start of your turn.
CLOUD-PRIME_MODE_POWER.smartDescription:
[gold]Operator[/gold]: Gain 1 ATB at the start of your turn. 
[gold]Punisher[/gold]: Increase damage boost and no longer removed when damaged.
CLOUD-PRIME_MODE_POWER.title: Prime Mode
CLOUD-HASTE_POWER.description: Gain 1 ATB at the start of your turn.
CLOUD-HASTE_POWER.smartDescription: Gain 1 ATB at the start of your turn.
CLOUD-HASTE_POWER.title: Haste
CLOUD-REPRIEVE_POWER.description: When you would die, heal to 30% of your max HP instead (works once).
CLOUD-REPRIEVE_POWER.smartDescription: When you would die, heal to 30% of your max HP instead (works once).
CLOUD-REPRIEVE_POWER.title: Reprieve
CLOUD-MAGIC_DAMAGE_UP_POWER.title: Magic Damage Up
CLOUD-SOLDIERS_PRIDE_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, if you did not take any damage last turn, gain vigor or block based on your stance.
CLOUD-SOLDIERS_PRIDE_POWER.smartDescript: At the start of your turn, if you did not take any damage last turn, gain vigor or block based on your stance.
CLOUD-SOLDIERS_PRIDE_POWER.title: SOLDIER's Pride
CLOUD-FURY_POWER.description: Increase damage taken by [blue]20%[/blue]. Gain 3 additional limit per turn and from using attacks. Removes [gold]Sedate[/gold].
CLOUD-FURY_POWER.smartDescription: Increase damage taken. Gain 3 additional limit per turn and from using attacks.
CLOUD-FURY_POWER.title: Fury
CLOUD-SEDATE_POWER.description: Decrease damage taken by [blue]10%[/blue]. Reduce limit gain per turn and from attacks by 2. Removes [gold]Fury[/gold]
CLOUD-SEDATE_POWER.smartDescription: Decrease damage taken by [blue]10%[/blue]. Reduce limit gain per turn and from attacks by 2.
CLOUD-SEDATE_POWER.title: Sedate
CLOUD-ARMOR_BREAK_POWER.title: Armor Break
CLOUD-COMBAT_MOMENTUM_POWER.description: The first time you switch to Punisher Mode on your turn, draw 1 card.
CLOUD-COMBAT_MOMENTUM_POWER.smartDescrip: The first time you switch to Punisher Mode on your turn, draw 1 card.
CLOUD-COMBAT_MOMENTUM_POWER.title: Combat Momentum
CLOUD-ATB_NEXT_TURN_POWER.description: Gain ATB at the start of next turn.
CLOUD-ATB_NEXT_TURN_POWER.smartDescripti: Gain ATB at the start of next turn.
CLOUD-ATB_NEXT_TURN_POWER.title: ATB Next Turn
CLOUD-MAGIC_SHIELD_POWER.description: Gain Block whenever you play [gold]Magic[/gold] this turn.
CLOUD-MAGIC_SHIELD_POWER.smartDescriptio: Gain Block whenever you play [gold]Magic[/gold] this turn.
CLOUD-MAGIC_SHIELD_POWER.title: Magic Shield
CLOUD-W_MAGIC_POWER.description: The first magic card you play each turn is played an extra time.
CLOUD-W_MAGIC_POWER.smartDescription: The first {Amount:plural:card you play each turn is|[blue]{}[/blue] cards you play each turn are} played an extra time.
CLOUD-W_MAGIC_POWER.title: Dualcast
CLOUD-SUMMON_UP_POWER.description: Double [gold]Summon[/gold] gained from attacks and [gold]Magic[/gold] cards.
CLOUD-SUMMON_UP_POWER.smartDescription: Double [gold]Summon[/gold] gained from attacks and [gold]Magic[/gold] cards.
CLOUD-SUMMON_UP_POWER.title: Summon Up
CLOUD-SUMMON_POWER.description: Summon powerful creatures to assist you in combat.
CLOUD-SUMMON_POWER.smartDescription: Summon powerful creatures to assist you in combat.
CLOUD-SUMMON_POWER.title: Summon
CLOUD-MAGIC_RESIST_DOWN_POWER.title: Magic Resist Down
